name: design-system
description: World-class DS governance — skills + hooks + rules + CLAUDE.md instructions + 31 active M-rules + 88 audit dims. Source-of-truth for product workspaces consuming @qijenchen/design-system npm package.

_metadata.structure_note: Phase 7 plugin spec migration ✅ DONE 2026-05-23 — `.claude/{skills,commands}/` 透過 root-level symlinks(`skills/` → `.claude/skills/` / `commands/` → `.claude/commands/`)expose at plugin root per Anthropic spec(symlinks 官方支援 per `code.claude.com/docs/en/plugins`「If you need to share files across plugins, use symlinks」)。Hooks 透過 `hooks/hooks.json` config + `hooks/scripts/` symlink到 `.claude/hooks/`,paths 用 `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/scripts/<name>.sh`。
migration_done: hooks/hooks.json generated from .claude/settings.json hooks section + ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT} path rewrite

hooks/scripts/ symlink → .claude/hooks/(59 .sh hook scripts + 4 aux command entries in hooks.json = 63 PreToolUse command slots per snapshot 2026-05-29;sync via sync-governance-counters.mjs;真值以 script 輸出為準避 drift)
intentional_omissions: .claude/rules/ — Anthropic plugin spec 沒明寫 path-scoped rules 機制。本 repo workaround:CLAUDE.md 已 reference 5 rules,plugin install 後 consumer 透過 CLAUDE.md instructions 仍能 reach rules content。
.claude/references/ — 同上,plugin install 後 consumer 仍可 cite path from CLAUDE.md。
.claude/memory/ — by design 不 distribute(memory 是 user-specific / session-specific,跨 user 不該 sync)。
